node.text: James's apartment lost power three days ago, disrupting his game progress as he forgot to save.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "power outage progress loss") on Session 28 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James tried Cyberpunk 2077 yesterday and found it addictive.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "power outage progress loss") on Session 28 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James learned that perseverance, patience, feedback, and collaboration are essential in game development.
James finished a Unity strategy game that he put a lot of time and effort into.
James found the process of creating the game challenging, especially balancing mechanics and fairness.
James mentioned being busy at work.
James loves playing strategy games like Civilization and Total War, which inspired him to create his own game.
James has a nostalgic attachment to old gaming setups, like playing on his mother's friend's console when he was young.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "power outage progress loss") on Session 28 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James appreciates the creativity and complexity of games, spending hours playing and learning from them.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "power outage progress loss") on Session 28 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James asked about the motivation behind John's creation of the software tool for the foundation.
